title: ozothamnus × expansifolius
intro: Ozothamnus × expansifolius, also known as a hybrid plant within the Ozothamnus genus, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Myrtaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ozothamnus × expansifolius include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infused in oil, or used in tincture form as part of traditional herbal remedies.
